title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 13th May 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Exit IT; sell Infosys on a rally and diversify
recommendations.detail: He repeated his long-standing call to come out of IT stocks and to sell Infosys on a rally. The viewer has held since 2004 (~300 shares) through a prolonged period and can't catch the sector shift in time, so he advised lightening the position on rallies and widening/diversifying the portfolio. IT won't behave as before unless companies reinvent their business models; he preferred redeploying into a little Adani Group (e.g. Adani Ports), a couple of power stocks, and some new-generation stocks.

recommendations.note: Weak result already discounted; hold above 10000
recommendations.detail: He noted the stock rose after a weak result because the result was discounted in advance; a sharp net-profit miss would normally drop a stock 8-10%, but it instead recovered with ~1% gains, so the market is discounting the future. He said hold as long as it holds the 10,000 mark, with potential to rally to 11,400-11,500, where he would exit.
